novel_features.name: Evidence-preserving inventory check
novel_features.description: Screen a bounded CSV inventory against CPSC product fields and expose exact identifiers and token-overlap evidence for every candidate.

novel_features.name: Brand/product change watch
novel_features.description: Compare a bounded brand or product recall observation with its prior local snapshot and report new or materially changed records.

novel_features.name: Hazard pulse
novel_features.description: Flatten recent hazard, remedy, injury, and product relationships while keeping recall counts distinct from incident rates.

novel_features.name: Actionable recall packet
novel_features.description: Join one recall's affected products, remedy, contact, images, incidents, and official URL into an action packet.

novel_features_built.name: Evidence-preserving inventory check
novel_features_built.description: Screen a bounded CSV inventory against CPSC product fields and expose exact identifiers and token-overlap evidence for every candidate.

novel_features_built.name: Brand/product change watch
novel_features_built.description: Compare a bounded brand or product recall observation with its prior local snapshot and report new or materially changed records.

novel_features_built.name: Hazard pulse
novel_features_built.description: Flatten recent hazard, remedy, injury, and product relationships while keeping recall counts distinct from incident rates.

novel_features_built.name: Actionable recall packet
novel_features_built.description: Join one recall's affected products, remedy, contact, images, incidents, and official URL into an action packet.

narrative.value_prop: Turn CPSC recall records into bounded inventory candidates, change observations, hazard composition tables, and actionable source packets without overstating fuzzy matches.

quickstart.comment: Build an actionable remedy and contact packet.

narrative.when_to_use: Use to screen household, school, or retail inventory against published CPSC recall evidence.
anti_triggers: Do not treat fuzzy matches as definitive product identity.
Do not infer incident rates without sales or exposure denominators.
Do not use this CLI to report a new unsafe product.

recipes.title: Screen an inventory
recipes.explanation: Return candidate matches with exact fields and token-overlap evidence.

recipes.title: Review recent hazards
recipes.explanation: Describe recent recall composition without rate claims.
